source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Space Grotesk-style English hierarchy for fast analytics scanning with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact numerics, clear status language, and readable multilingual controls.
layout: Precise 8px grid, 8px radii, shell-scale texture panels, teal active rails, orange decisive actions, cyan chart strokes, lime live-state signals, and dense dashboard surfaces for rapid insight.

prompts.label: Transparent Mantis Shrimp motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a single peacock mantis shrimp, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: accurate mantis shrimp anatomy with raised raptorial appendages, vivid compound eyes on stalks, segmented crustacean shell, teal carapace, orange limbs, coral-red accents, pearly rainbow shell highlights, crisp antennae, natural glossy shell texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full body visible from a slightly elevated three-quarter view; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural color, iridescence, and shell detail; energetic but natural.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff or magenta anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no coral, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
prompts.postProcess: Removed chroma key with the imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper using auto-key border, soft matte, transparent threshold 12, opaque threshold 220, and despill.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mantis Shrimp", a high-energy analytics system derived from the provided mantis shrimp cutout.
Reference use: Use the mantis shrimp image in the conversation as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, component energy, and chart language from its teal shell, orange raptorial claws, coral reef context, iridescent rainbow tail, and compound eyes.
Canvas: 16:9 horizontal board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, crisp UI text, spacious grid, no tiny dense tables. Use short labels only.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Mantis Shrimp", motif story, palette swatches with names, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, sample usage.
Typography: English guidance with a sharp grotesk for analytics UI; Japanese guidance with clean JP sans fallback. Include examples: "Signal velocity", "反応速度", "視覚解析".
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, compact enterprise dashboard energy, 8px card radius, tactile shell micro-texture.
Color palette: motif-derived near-white reef paper background, deep abyss teal ink, stomatopod teal primary, raptorial orange action color, optic coral accent, spectrum lime signal, iridescent cyan chart color, shell pearl surfaces, reef slate muted text.
Dashboard/data: analytics overview with line chart, segmented bar chart, radial eye scan chart, event stream, metric cards, filters, and alert states.
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, empty state, error state, loading state.
Text: short readable UI labels only; use exact palette and section names where practical.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no stock UI kit, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mantis Shrimp". It must feel like the same high-energy analytics system as the provided light board, translated to dark mode rather than redesigned.
Reference use: Use the mantis shrimp cutout and the light design-system board in the conversation as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, chart vocabulary, and shadcn/tweakcn UI coverage.
Canvas: 16:9 horizontal board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, crisp UI text, spacious grid, no tiny dense tables. Use short labels only.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Mantis Shrimp", label "Dark Mode", motif story, palette swatches with dark tokens, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, sample usage.
Typography: English guidance with Space Grotesk style; Japanese guidance with Noto Sans JP style. Include examples: "Signal velocity", "反応速度", "視覚解析".
Visual details: dark background derived from abyss teal and deep shell blue, light text from shell pearl, restrained high contrast, raptorial orange actions, optic coral alerts, spectrum lime success signals, iridescent cyan chart strokes, subtle shell-scale texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls with 8px radius.
Dashboard/data: dark analytics overview with line chart, segmented bar chart, radial eye scan chart, event stream, metric cards, filters, and alert states matching the light board.
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, empty state, error state, loading state.
Text: short readable UI labels only; use exact palette and section names where practical.
Constraints: no neon-only cyberpunk look, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
